heading: Cache River, Arkansas
label: 25 Cache River, Arkansas
text: The Cache River in the State of Arkansas is declared to be a nonnavigable stream within the meaning of the Constitution and laws of the United States. This provision shall become void after one year from , unless within said period the Legislature of Arkansas shall pass an act expressly approving this declaration. The right of the Congress to alter, amend, or repeal this section is expressly reserved.July 27, 1916
notes: CodificationSection was a provision of section 1 of act , popularly known as the “Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1916”.July 27, 1916
Approval of DeclarationSee Arkansas Laws 1917, ch. 2, act 406.
